sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16085" key="a)sa/leia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσάλεια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀσαλής</etym>) <sense id="n16085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carelessness,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
